beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Rennes vs Metz - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Rennes vs Metz - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Rennes are on a run of eight consecutive wins against Metz in Ligue 1, their longest streak against a single opponent in the top-flight. Rennes have won six of their last seven Ligue 1 matches against teams currently in the bottom half of the table, after failing to win any of their first six this season.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Nantes vs Strasbourg - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Nantes vs Strasbourg - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Nantes have won just one of their last nine Ligue 1 matches against Strasbourg, losing each of the last four. Nantes have failed to win any of their last six home Ligue 1 matches against Strasbourg, after winning 11 of the previous 12.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: MA Super Ligue 1
beIN SPORTS 4.title: MA Super Ligue 1

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Lens vs Angers SCO - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Lens vs Angers SCO - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Lens have won each of their last six Ligue 1 matches against Angers and could set their longest ever winning streak against the same opponent in the top-flight. Lens have lost only two of their last 21 home Ligue 1 games against Angers, in August 1993  and November 2020.

beIN SPORTS 4.original_title: Toulouse vs Lorient - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
beIN SPORTS 4.title: Toulouse vs Lorient - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 27
beIN SPORTS 4.desc: Toulouse are unbeaten in their last eight Ligue 1 matches against Lorient, after losing four of the previous seven. Toulouse have only won 21% of their home Ligue 1 matches against Lorient, their lowest percentage against an opponent they have hosted more than twice.

Sunderland are unbeaten in their last 10 league games against Newcastle, winning seven of the last eight. It’s the joint-longest run either side has had without defeat in the history of the fixture.

beIN 4K.original_title: Brighton & Hove Albion vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title: Brighton & Hove Albion vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc: No player has scored more goals from outside the box than Liverpool’s Dominik Szoboszlai this season. All four of his strikes have been from direct free-kicks, with only David Beckham  and Laurent Robert  netting more in a single campaign. Only Jérémy Doku  has had more successful dribbles in the Premier League this season than Brighton’s Yankuba Minteh.

beIN 4K.original_title: A.F.C. Bournemouth vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title: A.F.C. Bournemouth vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc: Bournemouth are unbeaten in their last five Premier League games against Manchester United, scoring more goals in these five  than they did in their first 12 against the Red Devils in the division. Manchester United have lost just two of their eight away Premier League games against Bournemouth. Their last two visits to the Vitality Stadium have seen them come from behind to draw.
